DEPENDENTS Value: 1-2 character with this trait has one or more vulnerable rela tives or other dependents who make perfect target for kid nappers ad other villains The value of the trait is based on the wulnerability of the dependents: If the dependent is reason ably competent adult who lives in fairly secure Iocation the trait IS worth point.
